rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(232, 232, 232), rgb(38, 38, 38)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 108px; height: 1px; padding-top: 137px; margin-left: 12px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(245, 245, 245), rgb(26, 26, 26)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 258px; height: 1px; padding-top: 69px; margin-left: 172px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
/strat-security-review
fetch STRAT from Jira, check idempotency
determine review tier (light/standard/deep)
extract threat surface inventory mechanically
spawn 3 independent reviewers (parallel, isolated)
synthesize consensus with confidence tagging

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(232, 232, 232), rgb(38, 38, 38)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 258px; height: 1px; padding-top: 62px; margin-left: 482px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
security-reviewer
LLM sub-agent (x3, forked)
check 39 risk patterns against threat surface
creative exploration for novel attack surfaces
apply relevance gate (STRAT evidence required)
classify severity via decision tree
check RHOAI organizational constraints

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(245, 245, 245), rgb(26, 26, 26)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Output
security-review.md (full consensus)
security-requirements.md (attached to Jira)
verdict label: pass / concerns / fail
